title: The Update Log #1 — Radiolab Follow-Ups (Jul 2026)
description: Your first mate chases nine threads from the Radiolab episodes you just heard, all the way up to 2026: the post-Heller gun rulings (Bruen, Rahimi, and the AR-15 case), Prigozhin's mutiny and fall (and the whistleblower we couldn't find), Uvalde and the 'no duty to protect' doctrine, the horseshoe-crab synthetic that arrived but didn't stick, Meta's moderation reversal, the Smarty Plants replication that failed, the Carlisle children coming home, Mississippi's new flag, and where Jad Abumrad went after Radiolab. Researched and fact-checked; where the original episodes got something wrong from a 2026 view, we say so.
